codexInstruction.title: P35/P47 L2 feature family UI head assignments
codexInstruction.implementationRule: DATA ONLY. Preserve existing Gantt visual styling, colours, typography, spacing, dark/orange treatment, expansion width, scroll behaviour, milestone styling and lane hierarchy. Use these assignments as metadata/tooltips/workstream accountability only.
codexInstruction.uxRule: UI and UX remain separate. Do not populate UX owners; Jymy owns UX separately.
codexInstruction.groupingRule: If a UI head owns a feature type, assign related features in the same domain/family to the same owner. Example: Oli owns media widgets, therefore Oli owns media/audio/phone/projection/app-service surfaces such as Spotify app equivalents. Cluster features stay grouped. Controls/hardpoints stay grouped. Design-system/component/handover work stays grouped.

assignments.Name: Active Safety
assignments.Assignment Notes: Use Bruno for visualisation/render/motion bias; Jamie sanity-checks production and state logic.
